title: Citrix security advisory (AV26-267)
description: On March 23, 2026, Citrix published a security advisory to address critical vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway 14.1   version prior to 14.1-66.59
NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway 13.1   versions prior to 13.1-62.23
NetScaler ADC FIPS and NDcPP   versions prior to 13.1-37.262
NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway   versions prior to 14.1-66.54
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
